page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8y.4xlarge is an Arm64-based compute-optimized instance powered by the custom Alibaba Yitian YiTian710 processor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores running at 2.75 GHz with a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio, eliminating hyperthreading overhead. The system is equipped with 32.0 GB of system memory, providing 2.0 GB of RAM per core. Cache architecture includes 64 KB L1 data cache, 1.0 MB L2 cache, and 64 MB L3 cache. It operates on the KVM hypervisor, lacks local storage, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps.

Benchmark data shows average performance across most compute and memory metrics. The instance achieved a stress-ng single-core score of 1816.59 and a multi-core score of 28931.94. Memory bandwidth is strong, with PassMark memory tests scoring in the top 25% and uncached large-block read speeds reaching 121.25 GB/sec. However, cryptography performance is a notable tradeoff, with the PassMark CPU encryption test scoring in the bottom 25% at 2612.79. For lightweight machine learning, the instance processes 135M parameter LLM prompts at 762.32 tokens/sec, though performance drops to a weak 21.3 tokens/sec for 7B parameter models.

Utilizing custom Arm64 silicon allows this instance to deliver competitive compute density and qualitative cost efficiency for workloads that do not require x86-specific instruction sets. Given its 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and solid multi-threaded decompression capabilities, the ecs.c8y.4xlarge is suited for compute-intensive tasks, web serving, and database operations that benefit from dedicated physical cores without requiring massive memory footprints or local storage.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8y.4xlarge is an Arm64 compute-optimized instance featuring 16 dedicated physical cores powered by the Alibaba Yitian YiTian710 processor running at 2.75 GHz. It is configured with 32.0 GB of RAM, providing a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, and offers a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps with no local storage. Performance benchmarks indicate average CPU and memory capabilities, highlighted by a strong PassMark memory score and solid multi-threaded decompression speeds. However, cryptographic performance is relatively weak. This instance is qualitatively cost-efficient for Arm-native workloads, making it suitable for web serving, database operations, and general compute-intensive applications that do not require specialized x86 instructions or local storage.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8y.4xlarge is an Arm64 compute-optimized instance featuring 16 dedicated Yitian710 physical cores, 32 GB of RAM, and 10 Gbps network bandwidth, suitable for web serving and database workloads.

tagline: An Arm64 compute-optimized instance featuring sixteen dedicated physical cores and balanced memory bandwidth for efficient web serving and database workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by 16 dedicated Alibaba Yitian710 Arm64 physical cores running at 2.75 GHz.
Equipped with 32 GB of system memory and 10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth.
Strong memory performance with high uncached read bandwidth.
Tradeoff in cryptographic performance, scoring in the lower tier for encryption tests.
Best suited for web serving, database operations, and Arm-native compute workloads.
